exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your health wellness forward
items: Complete a comprehensive health assessment by scheduling annual checkups with your primary care doctor, dentist, and eye doctor
Research and compile a list of your family medical history including chronic conditions, mental health issues, and genetic predispositions from both sides
Create a detailed inventory of your current health habits including sleep patterns, exercise routine, nutrition, stress levels, and substance use
Research and identify 3-5 qualified healthcare providers in your area including a primary care physician, mental health counselor, and specialist relevant to your health concerns
Learn and document your health insurance benefits including deductibles, copays, covered preventive services, and in-network providers
Complete a health and wellness assessment quiz or survey to identify your current fitness level, nutritional knowledge, and wellness priorities

items.title: The Mind-Body Connection: How Mental Wellness Transforms Physical Health
The Sleep Recovery Revolution: Optimizing Rest for Peak Wellness
Building Physical Resilience: The Foundation of Unshakeable Wellness
